shelfmark: Bodl. MS heb. f 56/45 + Bodl. MS heb. f 56/46
description: Court register. Bodl. MS heb. f 56/46v: A renewed betrothal contract dated Tammuz 1493 Seleucid = June/July 1182 CE. Groom: Abū l-Baqāʾ Sheʾerit b. Yefet. Bride: Muʿazzaza bt. Elʿazar. The date for marriage is set for the month of Av but the groom is given permission to 'delay' the marriage for another month, until the month of Elul. If he fails to marry her by the month of Elul the match will be cancelled and the bride will keep the money and the rings she was given in the early marriage gift. Signed by Avraham b. Shemuel ha-Levi and Levi b. Avraham ha-Levi (=the cantor Abū Sahl?)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
